ABS H79 v4.7

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC

[
  {
    "minbytes": 23,
    "replybytes": "5200AA000000FF00000C00D1020006000004FEFE00000004503F",
    "sentbytes": "1200040000",
    "name": "Read Freeze Frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "FFN": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Battery voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Occurence fault counter": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Wheel Speed Front Left": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Wheel Speed Front Right": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Wheel Speed Rear Left": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Wheel Speed Rear Right": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Vehicle Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Brake Light Switch": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DiagMuxON": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "MSR in regulation": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "EBD in regulation": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "ABS in regulation": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Longitudinal acceleration": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "Torque Control Type": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "ASRMSR Acknoledgement": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Raw pedal": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "Friction Torque": {
        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "Engine RPM": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      },
      "Mean Effective Torque": {
        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "ASR Dynamic Torque Request": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "ASR Static Torque Request": {
        "firstbyte": 20
      },
      "MSR Torque Request": {
        "firstbyte": 21
      },
      "Estimated Final Clutch Torque": {
        "firstbyte": 22
      },
      "ETS Driver demand": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "ETS Internal Operation Mode": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "bitoffset": 6
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "57FF00",

    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
